scripts.dev:live: concurrently -n be,fe -c blue,green "npm run _build:shared && npm run build -w @birthday/backend && APP_MODE=dev node apps/backend/dist/index.js" "npm run dev:tools -w @birthday/frontend"
scripts._build:party: npm run _build:shared && npm run build -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build -w @birthday/backend
scripts._build:cloud: npm run _build:shared && npm run build:cloud -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build -w @birthday/backend
scripts._build:dev: npm run _build:shared && npm run build:dev-tools -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build -w @birthday/backend
scripts.cloud:deploy: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 -t europe-west1-docker.pkg.dev/birthday-game-2026/birthday-game/birthday-game:latest --push . && gcloud run deploy birthday-game --image europe-west1-docker.pkg.dev/birthday-game-2026/birthday-game/birthday-game:latest --region europe-west1 --allow-unauthenticated --timeout 3600 --session-affinity --min-instances 0 --port 8080
scripts.cloud:start: gcloud run services update birthday-game --region europe-west1 --ingress all --min-instances 1
scripts.cloud:stop: gcloud run services update birthday-game --region europe-west1 --ingress internal --min-instances 0
